linting.notes: Ruff is the primary linter with select rules: E, F, UP, B, SIM, I. Pre-commit runs prettier (for non-Python), black (Python formatting), and isort (import sorting). The fmt.sh script wraps pre-commit.

env_vars: LOG_LEVEL, LOG_FILTERS, LOG_FORMATTER, LOG_THREAD_ID, LOG_CHANNEL_WIDTH (optional logging config)
testing.mock_patterns: pytest fixtures in conftest.py, test helpers in tests/base.py and tests/data_model_helpers.py
testing.notes: Tests use pytest markers: 'examples' for e2e examples, 'slow' for pyspark tests. Standard test run excludes both. Tests require full 'all' + 'dev-test' extras. Some tests require pyspark and will fail without it.

gating_checks.name: Build and Test (matrix: Python 3.8-3.11, proto3, core)

ci.notes: CI runs on push to main and pull_request to main. Build job uses matrix testing across Python 3.8-3.11, plus special proto3 and core environments. Lint job runs on Python 3.9. All checks are gating (required for merge).

build.notes: Version is dynamically generated from git tags via setuptools-scm and written to caikit/_version.py. Use 'all-dev' extra for complete development environment including runtime, interfaces, and dev tools.

conventions.test_naming: test_* functions, organized by module under tests/
conventions.import_style: isort enforced via pre-commit, grouped imports
conventions.notes: Coverage config omits caikit/runtime/protobufs/* and tests/**. Ruff excludes caikit/runtime/protobufs/*.py. Line length is 100 characters (ruff config).

lint_commands.notes: Passed - prettier, black, isort all passed

test_commands.notes: Partial pass - 1369 passed, 351 failed (mostly pyspark-related), 13 skipped, 5 errors. Core tests work well.

container_recipe.notes: Tox creates isolated virtualenvs and takes ~50-90 seconds to set up each environment. Direct pytest is faster for single test files. Some tests require pyspark infrastructure and will fail in basic container environment. For core functionality validation, use 'tests/core' or 'tests/config' directories.
